title: Pet Council Meeting Minutes
text:
## Pet Council Meeting Minutes

**Attending:** Violet the tortie head cat, Matilda the dark red golden retriever, Zebby the black kitten, and Baby Bear the baby bear.

**Agenda item one:** Should humans {verb} before breakfast? Vote: {number} yes, one {adjective} stare from Violet.

**Matilda's motion:** More {food} after every {adjective} walk.

**Zebby's motion:** Protect the {place} from {plural noun} and bother Violet less.

**Violet's motion:** Reserve all {color} sunbeams.

**Baby Bear's motion:** Add {adjective} honey to the {object}.

Meeting ended with {verb ending in -ing} and {emotion}.
